title: Sub. - Subscription Manager
description:
Hey everyone !

Sub. is a subscription manager that lets you manage all of your services in one place. It assists you in keeping track of active subscriptions as well as other services such as tracking your expenditures, reminding you of renewal dates, and managing them.

Let me know what you guys think!
